heading: What we track
description: From fixed assets and fleet to patients, documents, and wildlife — as industry pioneers, we were among the first to deliver tracking for almost everything that needs visibility.

items.title: Fixed Assets
items.description: Track machinery, equipment, and capital assets with real-time location and lifecycle visibility.

items.title: Finished Goods
items.description: Monitor finished products across warehouses, dispatch zones, and distribution channels.

items.title: Leased Assets
items.description: Manage leased equipment with accurate custody, usage, and return tracking across sites.

items.title: Tools
items.description: Prevent tool loss and downtime with check-in, check-out, and site-level tool tracking.

items.title: Parts & Consumables
items.description: Track spare parts and consumables to reduce stockouts and optimize replenishment cycles.

items.title: Raw Material
items.description: Gain visibility into raw material movement from intake to production and storage.

items.title: Marketing Assets–kiosks etc
items.description: Track kiosks, displays, and promotional assets deployed across retail and field locations.

items.title: Fleet/ Vehicle Tracking
items.description: Live fleet visibility for route optimization, utilization, and vehicle accountability.

items.title: Deliveries
items.description: End-to-end delivery tracking from dispatch to proof of delivery and customer handoff.

items.title: Military Equipment
items.description: Secure tracking for defense equipment with audit trails and controlled access visibility.

items.title: Document Tracking
items.description: Track critical documents through custody chains, approvals, and secure storage locations.

items.title: Employee Tracking
items.description: Improve workforce safety and coordination with location-aware employee visibility on site.

items.title: Patient Tracking
items.description: Support healthcare operations with patient flow, equipment, and care-area tracking.

items.title: Artwork Tracking
items.description: Protect high-value artwork with movement logs, storage visibility, and exhibition tracking.

items.title: Immigration Tracking
items.description: Streamline immigration-related asset and document tracking across checkpoints and offices.

items.title: Landbank Tracking
items.description: Monitor land parcels, site assets, and field resources across large landbank portfolios.

items.title: Supply Chain Tracking
items.description: Connect suppliers, warehouses, and distribution nodes with unified supply chain visibility.

items.title: Personal Tracker
items.description: Lightweight personal tracking for field staff, lone workers, and mobile personnel.

items.title: Key Tracker
items.description: Track keys and access credentials with issue logs, returns, and custody accountability.

items.title: Animal Migration Tracking
items.description: Monitor wildlife movement patterns with long-range tagging for research and conservation.
